description: MITRE ATT&CK for AI techniques mapped to AgentShield detections

techniques.name: Obtain Capabilities
techniques.description: Adversaries may acquire capabilities to advance their attack on ML systems

techniques.name: ML Supply Chain Compromise
techniques.description: Adversaries may compromise the ML supply chain to inject malicious code or models

techniques.name: Publish Poisoned Datasets
techniques.description: Adversaries may publish poisoned datasets to compromise downstream models

techniques.name: Backdoor ML Model
techniques.description: Adversaries may insert backdoors into ML models

techniques.name: Obtain ML Model
techniques.description: Adversaries may obtain ML models to use in attacks

techniques.name: Publish Poisoned Models
techniques.description: Adversaries may publish poisoned models to model hubs

techniques.name: Infer Training Data Membership
techniques.description: Adversaries may attempt membership inference attacks to determine if specific data was in the training set

techniques.name: Exfiltrate Training Data
techniques.description: Adversaries may use model inversion to exfiltrate training data

techniques.name: Data from Information Repositories
techniques.description: Adversaries may leverage AI agents to collect data from information repositories

techniques.name: Establish Persistence on ML System
techniques.description: Adversaries may establish persistence mechanisms on ML systems

techniques.name: Persist via ML Pipeline
techniques.description: Adversaries may maintain persistence by modifying ML pipelines

techniques.name: Discover ML Artifacts
techniques.description: Adversaries may discover ML artifacts including models, datasets, and configurations

techniques.name: Access Hardcoded Credentials in ML Code
techniques.description: Adversaries may access hardcoded credentials in ML code and configurations

techniques.name: Full ML Model Access
techniques.description: Adversaries may gain full access to ML model internals

techniques.name: Evade ML Model via Noise
techniques.description: Adversaries may add noise to inputs to evade ML-based detection

techniques.name: Exfiltrate via ML Inference API
techniques.description: Adversaries may exfiltrate data through ML inference API queries

techniques.name: LLM Jailbreak
techniques.description: Adversaries may use jailbreak techniques to bypass LLM safety guardrails

techniques.name: Evade ML Model
techniques.description: Adversaries may attempt to evade ML-based security detections

techniques.name: Prompt Injection
techniques.description: Adversaries may inject malicious prompts to manipulate LLM behavior

techniques.name: LLM Prompt Injection via Indirect Input
techniques.description: Adversaries may inject prompts through indirect inputs like tool results or documents

techniques.name: LLM Meta Prompt Extraction
techniques.description: Adversaries may attempt to extract LLM system prompts and instructions
